modules.description: Handles user onboarding and session management.

views.name: Log In
views.purpose: Authenticate existing users and redirect to dashboard.

views.name: Log Out
views.purpose: End the user session and redirect to login.

modules.description: The command center and primary landing page for authenticated users.

views.name: Dashboard
views.purpose: Display an overview of the user's sailing profile and active status.

modules.description: Configuration for individual vessels and shared access controls.

views.name: Boat Detail
views.purpose: Display a single boat's profile, historical stats, and crew list.

views.name: Create / Edit Boat
views.purpose: Form to input or change boat details.

modules.description: Core routing for creating, viewing, and sharing sailing journeys.

views.name: Trip Index
views.purpose: Searchable archive of all past voyages.

views.name: Internal Trip Detail
views.purpose: Master management view for a specific trip, restricted to crew.
uiElements: Public Sharing toggle and link generator

views.name: Public Shared Trip
views.purpose: Read-only, public-facing timeline for family and friends.
uiElements: Chronological timeline of logs and photos
NO administrative controls or edit buttons

views.name: Start Trip
views.purpose: Form to launch a new trip and set is_active=True for the Twilio webhook.

modules.description: Views for parsing and exploring unstructured log data.

views.name: Tag Archive
views.purpose: Display all log entries across all trips that contain a specific hashtag.
